channel.title: Download on TAPAAL
channel.description: Recent content in Download on TAPAAL

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Changelog 4.0.4 (2026-06-03): Bug fixes in the SMC engine verifydtapn and added seeding and custom distributions. Numerous GUI fixes, visualization of density functions for custom distributions, improved tikz export. Addition of constant ranges for parametric verification. 4.0.3 (2026-02-01): Fix to the precision issues in the SMC engine Added explicit simulation of CPN nets in the GUI Fixes numerous small issues the GUI and the untimed and discrete time engines.

item.title: Older releases
item.description: Older releases TAPAAL 4.0.3 for Windows Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.0.3 for Linux Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.0.3 for Intel Mac Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.0.3 for Arm Mac Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.0.2 for Windows Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.0.2 for Linux Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.0.2 for Intel Mac Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.0.2 for Arm Mac Download (64 bit) TAPAAL 4.
